key_observation: Baseline LLM relies solely on parametric knowledge with no external retrieval. Achieves a faithfulness of 0.69 and an answer relevance of 0.74, but produces a hallucination rate of 0.31, indicating the model occasionally generates content not grounded in verified sources.

Basic RAG retrieves relevant context from ChromaDB before answering. Faithfulness improves by 32% over the baseline (0.69 → 0.91). Hallucination rate drops by 71% (0.31 → 0.09), and answer relevance gains 5%. Grounding answers in retrieved evidence substantially improves trustworthiness.
